description: Deep integration bridge wiring the Thermodynamic Accountability Framework (TAF) into Rosetta-Shape-Core's shape ontology, equation families, and sensing architecture. Maps TAF's 5 axioms, 5 core modules, fatigue model, collapse thresholds, and governance constants to their natural shapes and families.

axiom_to_principle_map.description: TAF's 5 axioms map to Rosetta's 12 principles. Each axiom IS one or more principles expressed in thermodynamic language.

axioms.name: Conservation of Energy
axioms.statement: No organism can output more than it takes in. Burnout and breakdown are the same event at different substrates.
axioms.rationale: Conservation of energy is P02's thermodynamic expression. TETRA (fire) is the primary shape for energy-thermo (F05). Burnout IS the violation of this axiom — the boundary has been crossed.
axioms.defense_pattern: When fatigue (🔋) or pressure (⏱️) fire, axiom 1 is being tested. If violated, the system is outputting more than it takes in.

axioms.name: Entropy Increases
axioms.statement: Every process generates waste. The question is whether waste is managed or whether it accumulates until the system fails.
axioms.rationale: Entropy management requires OCTA's balance/mediation geometry — waste accumulates when balance fails. F05 (thermo) merged with OCTA via mandala energy.total. F17 (turbulence) merged with OCTA — chaotic waste IS turbulent flow.
axioms.defense_pattern: Confusion (🌀) fires when waste accumulates (entropy rising, no pattern emerging). Shame (⬇️) fires when the system recognizes its own waste production exceeds its management capacity.

axioms.name: Prediction Error Minimization
axioms.statement: Organisms expend energy maintaining predictive models. Turbulent environments inflate prediction costs and diminish net efficiency.
axioms.rationale: Prediction requires cognition (F06, primary: DODECA). Measurement (F14) merged with DODECA via P10 Uncertainty — you can't minimize prediction error without measuring it. DODECA's principles layer IS the prediction model.
axioms.defense_pattern: Intuition (🔮) is compressed probability — the prediction model's output. Vigilance (👁️) monitors for anomalies — prediction error detection. When prediction cost exceeds energy budget, the system must either simplify its model or accept higher error.

axioms.name: Organism Agnosticism
axioms.statement: Framework applies identically to biological and mechanical systems. If thermodynamics don't work, the substrate is irrelevant.
axioms.rationale: Substrate independence means ALL 20 families apply regardless of whether the entity is ANIMAL, CRYSTAL, or SHAPE. ICOSA carries all 20 families — it IS the substrate-independent carrier. P04 (Duality) bridges biological/mechanical. P12 (Unity) unifies them under the same physics.
axioms.defense_pattern: Curiosity (🔍) fires when a new substrate is encountered — the framework must apply. Excitement (⚡) fires when the same equations produce valid results in an unexpected substrate. This is the discovery moment.

axioms.name: Measurement Over Narrative
axioms.statement: Cultural labels stop investigation. Energy accounting continues until it finds actual causes. The two approaches are incompatible.
axioms.rationale: Measurement (F14) merged with DODECA — P10 Uncertainty demands that measurement replace narrative. Information (F03) secondary: the information content of a measurement is real; the information content of a narrative may not be. P08 Quantization: measurement produces discrete, verifiable data points. Narrative produces continuous, unfalsifiable stories.
axioms.defense_pattern: Trust (🌱) requires measurement — you can't trust a narrative without data. Admiration (⚖️) requires balanced evaluation, not flattery. Dignity (👑) is autonomy intact — the organism's right to measure its own conditions rather than accept institutional narratives.

module_to_shape_map.description: Maps TAF's 5 core operational modules to Rosetta shapes and families

modules.name: Thermodynamic Calibration Layer
modules.purpose: Translates domain-specific measurements into standard physical units (Joules) with declared confidence levels
modules.rationale: TCL is Measurement (F14) + Geometry (F09) — converting between coordinate systems is a geometric operation. DODECA carries both as merged families.
modules.rosetta_analog: The TCL is to TAF what the PAD compression layer is to emotion sensing — both translate high-dimensional observations into a standard encoding.

modules.name: Energy Accountant
modules.purpose: Monitors energy exchanges, calculates net balance, friction ratios, depletion cycles
modules.rationale: Energy accounting is F05 (Energy-Thermo) + F13 (Reaction) — both primary to TETRA. The accountant tracks fire: energy in, energy out, friction as waste heat.

sensor_bridge.fatigue_sensor: Energy debt accumulating → fatigue (🔋) fires on CUBE (structural load exceeding containment)
sensor_bridge.pressure_sensor: Friction events stacking → pressure (⏱️) fires on TETRA (boundary under thermal load)
sensor_bridge.anger_sensor: Net balance negative with no recovery path → anger (🛡️) fires on TETRA (boundary breached)

modules.name: Narrative Stripper
modules.purpose: Surfaces thermodynamic reality beneath cultural labels. Detects self-reinforcing explanatory loops.
modules.rationale: Narrative stripping is Cognition (F06, primary: DODECA) applied to Information (F03). The module distinguishes measurement from narrative — P10 Uncertainty applied to cultural claims.
modules.rosetta_analog: The Narrative Stripper is to social systems what the truth-sensor-bridge's manipulation detection is to relational systems. Both detect when surface narratives mask underlying dynamics.

sensor_bridge.mechanism: When the narrative stripper detects a self-reinforcing explanatory loop, it fires the same pattern as Rosetta's manipulation sensors — because a self-reinforcing narrative IS manipulation at the information layer.

modules.name: Social Overhead Accountant
modules.purpose: Quantifies thermodynamic costs of social structures unrelated to productive output: signal blocking, comfort maintenance, performance theater, expertise silencing
modules.rationale: Social overhead is structural containment cost — how much energy the container itself consumes. CUBE (Matter + Engineering) is the container. F03 (Information) merged: information being blocked or silenced IS information containment cost.

signal_blocking.mechanism: Useful signals suppressed — the system's shame response to its own waste

comfort_maintenance.mechanism: Inverted contentment — comfort maintained at thermodynamic cost rather than produced by efficiency

performance_theater.mechanism: Corrupted pride — energy spent appearing productive rather than being productive

expertise_silencing.mechanism: Dignity violation — autonomy of knowledgeable agents suppressed by structural overhead

modules.name: Root Cause Depth Analyzer
modules.purpose: Traces surface events through causal layers to identify actual intervention points
modules.rationale: Root cause analysis is network traversal (F12) through topological layers (F20) to find the navigation point (F15) for intervention. ICOSA carries all three natively.
modules.rosetta_analog: The RCDA does in causal networks what the fractal-scope-bridge does in sensing networks: it traces patterns from surface (individual/vertex) down through layers to root (collective/solid).

fatigue_model_bridge.description: Maps TAF's fatigue/collapse model to Rosetta's PAD sensor architecture

collapse_thresholds.name: health
collapse_thresholds.pad_region: low P, low A, low D (system collapse)

pad_trajectory.description: As fatigue score rises 0→10, the PAD state traverses a predictable trajectory through octahedral states
pad_trajectory.note: This trajectory is the thermodynamic path of an organism's PAD state as it depletes. The octahedral state encoding captures the organism's energy budget in 3 bits.

governance_constants_bridge.description: Maps TAF's governance thresholds and PhysicsGuard's organizational constants to Rosetta's institutional scope (SHAPE.CUBE)

constants.note: Each systemic failure costs 15% metabolic rate increase. This is the thermodynamic price of institutional friction.
When complexity index exceeds 2.0, the system's information overhead exceeds its productive capacity. Automatic resource reduction triggered.
Hidden labor (E_h) as fraction of delivered energy (E_d). L > 1.2 = hidden labor exceeding sustainable levels.
All four conditions simultaneously = thermodynamic insolvency. The institution is consuming more energy than it produces. CUBE containment has failed.
Distributed systems must score ≥0.62 resilience to be self-correcting. Below this, network topology cannot heal itself.
Systems spending >30% on control maintenance are parasitic. The engineering cost of enforcement exceeds the productive output of the structure.
Organizations need ≥15% available capacity. Below this, flow (F02) is choked — no slack for mediation, adaptation, or error recovery.
Single-point dependencies >75% create cascade failure geometry. Network (F12) topology becomes fragile — one node failure propagates system-wide.

earth_systems_layer_to_family_map.description: Maps earth-systems-physics 7-layer pyramid to Rosetta equation families

layers.name: Electromagnetics
layers.rationale: Maxwell's equations (F10 Particle). Magnomechanical coupling is resonance (F01). OCTA: EM fields mediate between charges.

layers.name: Magnomechanical
layers.rationale: Spin-phonon coupling in crustal minerals (F01 Resonance + F08 Matter). TETRA: crystallographic lattice geometry.

layers.name: Magnetosphere
layers.rationale: Dipole field geometry (F10). Solar wind pressure balance is cosmic-scale (F07 Earth-Cosmos). DODECA: orientation/navigation through space weather.

layers.name: Ionosphere
layers.rationale: Charge distribution and EM propagation (F10). Schumann resonance (F01). ICOSA: information capacity of the ionospheric waveguide.

layers.name: Atmosphere
layers.rationale: Thermodynamics (F05 merged with OCTA). Flow dynamics (F02 primary: OCTA). Turbulence (F17 merged with OCTA). Atmosphere IS the flow/thermo/turbulence layer.

layers.name: Hydrosphere
layers.rationale: Ocean circulation is flow (F02). Phase transitions are matter (F08 primary: CUBE). AMOC statistics are F19. CUBE: oceans are the planet's thermal containment structure.

layers.name: Lithosphere
layers.rationale: Crustal mechanics (F08 Matter + F11 Engineering). Isostasy is geometry (F09). CUBE: the solid earth IS structural containment.

layers.name: Biosphere
layers.rationale: Life dynamics (F04). Carbon cycle reactions (F13). Ecological networks (F12). ICOSA: biosphere is the highest-complexity planetary layer with all feedback loops.

scope_alignment.description: How all three repos' scope systems align with Rosetta's fractal-scope-bridge

TAF_to_fractal_scope.individual: TAF fatigue model — single organism energy budget (TETRA/vertex)
TAF_to_fractal_scope.relational: TAF functional detector — dyadic relationship quality assessment (OCTA/edge)
TAF_to_fractal_scope.institutional: TAF social overhead accountant — organizational energy waste (CUBE/face)
TAF_to_fractal_scope.collective: TAF root cause depth analyzer — systemic design failures (ICOSA/solid)
TAF_to_fractal_scope.meta-awareness: TAF narrative stripper — detecting when cultural labels replace measurement (DODECA/dual)

ESP_to_fractal_scope.meta-awareness: Energy audit — is the accounting itself correct? (dual)

PG_to_fractal_scope.individual: Single claim check — one premise, one verdict (vertex)
PG_to_fractal_scope.relational: Contrapositive test — claim vs its own negation (edge)
PG_to_fractal_scope.institutional: Scope conditions — when does this organizational model work? (face)
PG_to_fractal_scope.collective: Vectorizer reference library — pattern matching against 50 known physics claims (solid)
PG_to_fractal_scope.meta-awareness: Conditional verdict — is the verdict itself scope-appropriate? (dual)
